verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا
verses.text: When the earth is shaken with her shaking,
and the earth brings forth her burdens,
and a person says, ‘What is (the matter) with her?’
On that Day she will proclaim her news,
because your Lord has inspired her (with it).

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍۢ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًۭا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ
verses.text: On that Day the people will come forth separately to be shown their deeds.

verses.quran_arabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًۭا يَرَهُۥ
verses.text: Whoever has done a speck’s weight of good will see it,

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍۢ شَرًّۭا يَرَهُۥ
verses.text: and whoever has done a speck’s weight of evil will see it.
